description: Adrec Corp. is a Japanese manufacturer specializing in digital torque management solutions for manufacturing industries. Based in Niigata, Japan, we develop and supply wireless digital torque wrenches, torque data management systems, and manufacturing support software that improve tightening quality, traceability, poka-yoke, and operational efficiency. Our digital torque wrench systems enable accurate torque measurement, real-time data collection, and reliable inspection control for assembly and maintenance operations. By integrating hardware and software, our solutions support error prevention, quality assurance, work standardization, and production data management on manufacturing sites. We also provide software solutions for torque data analysis, inspection record management, work instruction support, and traceability control. Our systems can be connected with PCs, PLCs, and factory networks to support smart manufacturing and digital transformation initiatives. Adrec products are used in a wide range of industries, including automotive, construction machinery, railway, industrial equipment, precision machinery, and maintenance services. Leveraging Japanese manufacturing expertise and practical field experience, we deliver reliable, user-friendly, and high-quality solutions that help manufacturers improve productivity and quality control.
address: 1-1-12 Sengari, Kamo-shi, Niigata Prefecture, 959-1327 Japan

product_categories: Blades,Sawing Machines
description: PRECISION FOR OVER 230 YEARS ARNTZ is more than a company, we are a living piece of industrial history. Rooted in the Bergisches Land, the cradle of German metalworking, we stand as Remscheid’s oldest tool manufacturer and a seventh- generation family business, combining tradition with technological progress. What began in 1793 has evolved into an internationally operating technology leader in high-performance band saw blades, with production facilities in Germany and the USA. Over two centuries of metalworking expertise are built into every product, forming the foundation for precision tools used in more than 80 countries worldwide. A striking example is the millimeter-accurate machining of the double T-beams for the One World Trade Center in the USA, carried out with band saw blades from ARNTZ. Our solutions cover a broad range of applications, from cutting tubes and profiles to the precise machining of high-strength titanium forgings for medical implants. Every production step passes through a multi-stage control system to ensure consistently measurable top quality.
address: Lenneper Str. 35, Remscheid

description: ATOKA, a core brand of Zhejiang Eagle Technology Co., Ltd., is a trusted manufacturer specializing in advanced precision metrology solutions. With over 16 years of experience in research and development, Eagle has established a strong foundation in delivering innovative and reliable measurement technologies to global industries. ATOKA focuses on the integration of R&D, manufacturing, and technical services, offering a comprehensive portfolio of high-performance measurement systems, including Coordinate Measuring Machines (CMM), 2D–2.5D Optical Vision Measuring Machines (VMM), high-speed Flash Measurement Systems, as well as profile and surface roughness measuring instruments. Designed to meet the increasing demands of modern manufacturing, ATOKA solutions enable fast, accurate, and repeatable measurement results, supporting quality control and production efficiency across industries such as automotive, electronics, precision engineering, mold and tooling, and medical devices. Backed by nearly 80 patents and intellectual property rights—including invention patents, software copyrights, utility models, and industrial designs—Eagle demonstrates strong technological capabilities and a commitment to continuous innovation. With a forward-looking vision, ATOKA is dedicated to delivering high-precision, efficient, and intelligent metrology solutions, empowering manufacturers worldwide to achieve higher standards of quality and performance.

description: Long Hau Corporation (LHC) is Vietnam’s leading industrial real estate developer, with deep expertise in developing and operating industrial parks. Strategically positioned where Ho Chi Minh City, the Mekong Delta, and Southeast Vietnam converge - with direct access to major expressways, ring roads, and the three key seaports of Cat Lai, Hiep Phuoc, and Long An International Port. We develop next-generation green industrial park models guided by ESG principles, integrating technical infrastructure, social amenities, and comprehensive service systems to harmonize industrial growth with quality living environments. Our product portfolio includes industrial land, LEED-certified ready-built factories, build-to-suit factories, and hi-tech factories designed to optimize land efficiency while meeting global green transition demands. Long Hau Leed Park (LHLP), LHC’s flagship LEED-certified factory and warehouse development, sets the benchmark for sustainable industrial real estate near Ho Chi Minh City. LHC’s development strategy extends beyond our home base in Can Giuoc Commune, Tay Ninh, to strategic expansion projects such as our Hi-tech Factory in Da Nang City - where urban planning, manufacturing, and industrial growth coexist seamlessly, benefiting both the workforce and the broader investment community. We deliver optimal solutions across diverse sectors including automation, precision mechanics, healthcare, pharmaceuticals, food, consumer goods, and logistics, while facilitating collaboration among customers and service partners. Today, LHC has cultivated a thriving community of over 300 international corporations, attracting an expanding workforce to live and prosper in our developments.

description: Leading Brand in Centralized Lubrication Systems Founded in 1978, Chen Ying Oil Machine Co., Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of Centralized Lubrication Systems, specializing in oil and grease lubrication solutions, such as manual and electric lubricators, pumps, distributors, and a complete range of accessories. With over 47 years of professional manufacturing experience, Chen Ying offers customized solutions tailored to diverse industrial applications, ensuring optimal machine performance, extended equipment life, and reduced maintenance costs. Commitment to Integrity, Professionalism, and Quality Chen Ying has always been committed to the business philosophy of "integrity, professionalism, and quality" and has always sourced the best quality parts and the most durable components within the assembly of each product. The company continually pursues excellence and faces every product challenge without compromise. This uncompromising approach has earned Chen Ying strong recognition and long-term trust from customers worldwide. Professional R & D that Sustains an Eternal Leadership Position Chen Ying has always been committed to engaging in innovative R & D. and has produced many newly-patented products, which can significantly reduce customer costs and enhance machinery equipment performance. With a strong engineering foundation, Chen Ying focuses on creating user-friendly, modular, and high-efficiency lubrication systems that meet the evolving needs of modern manufacturing and automation industries. Your Reliable Partner in the Global Industry Chen Ying serves a wide range of industries, including machine tools, automation, CNC machining, automation systems, and heavy-duty equipment. Its products are exported worldwide, with a strong presence in Asia, Europe, the United Sates, and the Middle East. As a trusted partner, Chen Ying is dedicated to building long-term collaborations and supporting customers with high-quality lubrication solutions on the global stage.

product_categories: Control, Measuring & Monitoring /Inspection Equipment,Metal Cutting Machines - Others
description: CHUNLIN UNION CO ., established in 1993, is an affiliate of Minipan Ironworks. Initially set up to produce casings for Japanese processing equipment, it later focused on manufacturing small-scale food processing machinery and vacuum mixers for the chemical industry. In its mid-term, it specialized in customized machinery and refurbished used equipment, encompassing various industries including steel structures, metal cutting, plastic blow molding, and aluminum extrusion. Since 1998, it has been developing its own electrical control machinery plant, specializing in mechanical electrical control for over 20 years. In 2022, the family consolidated its brand companies and resources, merging Minipan and CHUNLIN, shifting to a brand-oriented business model, and establishing Shuang-Wei Precision Electromechanical Co., Ltd. as a key focus. Starting in 2023, it began collaborating with foreign manufacturers to jointly develop mechanical structures in Taiwan, conducting trials there, and developing its own brand of circular saws. It also acts as a distributor of band saws and related consumables and equipment.

description: About DN Solutions and HELLER Since its founding in 1976, DN Solutions has established itself as a leading global machine tool company, ranking as the world’s third-largest machine tool brand by revenue. By recently acquiring HELLER—a historic German manufacturer founded in Nürtingen in 1894—the company has significantly expanded its technological footprint and global manufacturing capabilities. The integrated product portfolio now encompasses more than 400 product types. This includes DN Solutions' highly successful DNT, DNM, SMX, and DVF lines, renowned for their durability, precision, and rigidity, seamlessly complemented by HELLER’s state-of-the-art 4-axis and 5-axis machining centres, dynamic mill-turn centres, and special-purpose machines designed for highly productive series manufacturing. Operating as a unified multinational force, the company meets the diverse and complex needs of customers across the automotive, aerospace, medical technology, energy, and semiconductor sectors. With HELLER’s four production facilities across Europe, Asia, and the Americas, alongside DN Solutions’ robust network of over 140 dealers in 66 countries, the combined group guarantees dependable supply and localized expertise in all key markets. Driven by a shared vision for the future, DN Solutions and HELLER provide not only high-end physical machining solutions but also advanced digital manufacturing platforms like CUFOS, modular services, and highly productive automation systems, paving the way toward the future of intelligent production.

description: Established in 2013 and headquartered in Houjie Town, Dongguan, China, Dongguan Binsen Hardware and Plastics Co., Ltd. operates from a modern 16,000 m² facility. With over 200 dedicated professionals, including experienced engineers and quality control specialists, Binsen specializes in integrated precision manufacturing solutions. Core Business Divisions: Injection Molding Division: Offers comprehensive services from mold design to mass production, utilizing advanced equipment. Annually delivers over 260 precision molds, ensuring efficiency, rapid response, and consistent quality. Metal Stamping and Tooling Division: Provides professional one-stop solutions for precision metal components, including mold engineering and high-volume stamping production. Also delivers over 260 metal mold sets annually with mature technology and reliable standards. Parts Processing Division: Serves as the central manufacturing hub, employing automated CNC systems and smart management for high-precision part machining. Products & Applications: Capabilities span precision connectors, automotive components, medical devices, and aviation parts, serving demanding industries like automotive, industrial, aerospace, and communications globally. Quality Commitment: Adheres to a stringent quality policy ("High-standard, High Requirement, All-digital Control, Full Participation") and holds certifications including IATF 16949:2016, ISO 9001:2015, and ISO 14001:2015. Vision: To become the preferred supplier for high-end connector customers, leveraging expertise in precision, specialization, and cutting-edge technology to be a trusted global manufacturing partner.
address: No.2, Road 3, Qiaotou Third Industrial Park, Houjie Town, Dongguan City, Guangdong, China 523950

description: Echaintool Precision Co., Ltd. is a professional manufacturer of CNC cutting tools, providing a comprehensive range of solutions for metalworking applications. Serving industries such as general machining, automotive, aerospace, energy, and precision engineering, Echaintool is committed to delivering reliable tooling performance for a wide variety of materials including steel, stainless steel, and cast iron. By combining practical application experience with advanced tool design, we help customers improve machining stability, extend tool life, and enhance overall productivity. Echaintool continues to develop innovative and practical solutions to support sustainable and competitive production in modern industries. Overseas agents wanted.

description: Festo is a global player and an independent family-owned company with headquarters in Esslingen am Neckar, Germany. Festo has set standards in industrial automation technology and technical education ever since its establishment, thereby making a contribution to sustainable development of the environment, the economy and society. The company supplies pneumatic and electrical automation technology to 300,000 customers of factory and process automation in over 35 industries. The LifeTech sector with medical technology and laboratory automation is becoming increasingly important. The products and services are available in 176 countries. With about 20,700 employees in over 250 branch offices in 61 countries worldwide, Festo achieved a turnover of around €3.36 billion in 2021. Each year around 7% of this turnover is invested in research and development. In this learning company, 1.5 % of turnover is invested in basic and further training. Festo Didactic SE is a leading provider of technical education and training and offers its customers worldwide comprehensive digital and physical learning solutions in the industrial environment.

description: Gerardi is a leading European company, globally recognized for the quality and reliability of its clamping and industrial automation solutions. Gerardi is also a key reference in the production of tombstones for horizontal machines, offering one of the widest ranges on the market. Its modular ecosystem also features the Zero Point system for fast setup, changing, and positioning of equipment, significantly reducing downtime and improving productivity, enabling turnkey clamping solutions for any requirement. Another core strength is the production of high-performance angular heads for both CNC and conventional machines, as well as driven tools for CNC lathes. These solutions, enabling milling, drilling, and tapping operations, are highly valued for their precision and reliability, particularly in aerospace, automotive, and other high-precision industries. In recent years, Gerardi has expanded into automation with its ROBI system for automatic production changeover. The portfolio now also includes robotic grippers, automatic vises, and automatic Zero Point systems, representing advanced industrial automation and enabling highly efficient production management with reduced setup times. Today, Gerardi remains a strategic global partner, delivering innovative, precise, and reliable solutions while continuously investing in technology and customer-focused innovation.

description: Honor Seiki Co., Ltd. continues to develop quality CNC Vertical lathe and Vertical turning center to meet the highest standards in precision, efficiency, and reliability. Honor Seiki was founded in 1987, with more than 35 years of experience in VTL machine design and manufacturing. HONOR SEIKI is the most professional, leading brand, machine tool provider which has international quality certificates and well reputation in the fields of CNC Vertical Lathe and Turnkey solutions in Taiwan. Honor Seiki adapted the dual channels of standard VTL and industry solutions to increase its market share. The strength of Honor Seiki is customized design to meet the user’s requirements such as special jigs & fixtures, and robotic loading & unloading to increase both volume and quality of mass production. The worldwide patent “Solid Lock" clamping System and “Roller Gear Transmission System” are our capabilities. We mainly focus on the production of Vertical lathes and strive to do it well. Achieving and fulfilling customers’ satisfaction is our mission. We are proud of providing our machines to many leading companies around the world. The main application fields of Honor’s machine are the aerospace industry, defense industry, automotive industry, railway industry, mining industry, oil, and gas industry, wind energy, and so on. Continuing improvement is the unrelenting mission of Honor Seiki. Based on the concepts of Sustainable management, High Quality, High Efficiency, Well-Accuracy, Honesty, and Responsibility are our promises to cooperative partners.

description: Innse-Berardi, part of Camozzi Group, is based in Brescia. Specializing in the engineering, production, and commissioning of high-tech and best-performing machine tools, it serves as a benchmark for the heavy mechanical industries, such as Energy (Oil & Gas, nuclear, wind), Transportation (railway, marine, automotive), and Aerospace. Innse-Berardi offers a comprehensive range of products suitable for various application sectors. The Atlas series includes vertical multitasking machining centers, whereas the Aries series comprises advanced horizontal boring and milling machines, both equipped with either hydrostatic or mechanical technologies. Additionally, the PowerMax® family specializes in high-speed milling and trimming of large, complex-geometry parts in aluminum, titanium, and hard metals. This extensive product line establishes Innse-Berardi as a strategic and reliable technological partner, providing turnkey solutions based on deep experience in processing complex components. In response to the requirements of Industry 4.0, Innse-Berardi's machines are engineered to enable the integration of production lines into a connected digital system. IBNET and IBRM are the digital platforms developed by Innse-Berardi in collaboration with Camozzi Digital to enhance production management, monitoring operating conditions and include predictive maintenance.

product_categories: Grinding Machines
description: Rettificatrici Ghiringhelli SpA established in 1921 are based in the North of Italy on Lake Maggiore. For more than 80 years RETTIFICATRICI GHIRINGHELLI S.p.A. have developed a range of high-tech centreless grinding machines which find applications in various fields of manufacturing i.e. automotive, bearings, electric motors, aerospace, household appliances, hydraulics, tools, medical, textile. Ghiringhelli centreless grinding machines are CNC controlled and are capable of being utilized as standalone units or linked into automatic lines. They are equipped with specific tooling according to customers’ requirements and are suitable for plunge grinding multi diameter components or through feed grinding of plain cylindrical components. For years committed to act according to the ESG Environmental Social and Governance principles of sustainability, Rettificatrici Ghiringhelli has adopted several solutions to improve the production efficiency of its centreless grinding machines and optimize the use of raw materials and resources with particular attention to the Circular Economy too.

For more than 80 years RETTIFICATRICI GHIRINGHELLI S.p.A. have developed a range of high-tech centreless grinding machines which find applications in various fields of manufacturing i.e. automotive, bearings, electric motors, aerospace, household appliances, hydraulics, tools, medical, textile. Ghiringhelli centreless grinding machines are CNC controlled and are capable of being utilized as standalone units or linked into automatic lines. They are equipped with specific tooling according to customers’ requirements and are suitable for plunge grinding multi diameter components or through feed grinding of plain cylindrical components. For years committed to act according to the ESG Environmental Social and Governance principles of sustainability, Rettificatrici Ghiringhelli has adopted several solutions to improve the production efficiency of its centreless grinding machines and optimize the use of raw materials and resources with particular attention to the Circular Economy too. Pavilion: IMT.

description: INDEX - better.parts.faster. With its INDEX and TRAUB brands, the INDEX Group is today one of the world’s leading manufacturers of CNC turning machines. The Company Group in Esslingen has 80 sites worldwide with 6 production sites and 12 international sales and service companies as well as an extensive retailer network. Progress has a long tradition INDEX-Werke were set up in 1914 by Hermann Hahn who began that year with the production of automatic turret turning machines. He was a Swabian entrepreneur through and through who laid the foundation for an impressive development with creative ideas and an aspiration for quality. Within four decades, more than 20,000 turning machines had been sold and these formed the basis for the excellent reputation of INDEX around the world. In 1975, INDEX began with the production of multi-spindle turning machines. A few years later, the company entered the market for CNC technology. And INDEX soon assumed a pioneering role here. After the death of Eugen Hahn, the son of the company’s founder, 85% of the company shares were put into a foundation. In 1992, INDEX presented a new generation of turn-mill centers based on a modular component system. In 1997, TRAUB Drehmaschinen GmbH & Co. KG from neighboring Reichenbach/Fils was taken over and integrated into the INDEX Group. The company pursues a two-brand strategy to this very day.
address: Plochinger Straße 92, Esslingen

description: ITALIAN MANUFACTURING TECHNOLOGIES (IMT) Vietnam is a network agreement among a group of Italian companies, manufacturers of machine tools willing to share their objectives and strategies, strengthening their presence in the Vietnamese market and in ASEAN region, through an office with a local team dedicated to promotional activities. IMT Vietnam allows member companies to have stable presence in the market, providing to the Vietnamese industry the opportunity to interact directly with member companies through their local office. Vietnamese companies can consider IMT as their first point of reference in Vietnam and get immediate answer/feedback to their queries from the respective Italian companies. The main objectives of IMT are promoting the brands of IMT companies and the IMT trademark; supporting the setting up of a constant market presence; carrying out promotional initiatives aimed at increasing the visibility of IMT companies, like the participation at the most important trade exhibitions in Vietnam, the organization of seminars and workshops, B2B meetings. President of IMT Vietnam is Mrs. Barbara Colombo (Managing Director of FICEP) who has assigned to GWA Asia (www.gwa-asia.com) the management of IMT activities and administration. This innovative project is promoted by UCIMUSISTEMI PER PRODURRE (the Italian machine tools, robots and automation manufacturers’ Association – www.ucimu.it).

description: We are engaged in the circuit board assembly business, handling electronic components. The company was founded in 1976 and is celebrating its 50th anniversary this year. In 2024, it also established a factory in Dong Nai City, Vietnam. As an electronics manufacturing services (EMS) provider, we deliver products to a wide range of customers. We primarily handle industrial and medical equipment, and while we don't have our own products, we have engineers who can design enclosures and circuit boards, so we can handle development requests from the ground up. We can also procure components such as electronic parts, harnesses, and enclosures from a variety of suppliers. We can provide development, parts procurement, and manufacturing services as a complete package, and we can also start from the stage requested by the customer. Our Vietnam factory, established in 2024, also introduced PCB assembly equipment and began production in 2025. With production bases in Japan and Vietnam, we will continue our activities to meet our customers' needs.
address: 100-1 Naka, Mishima-shi, Shizuoka 411-0833, Japan

description: JJ TOOLS is a South Korea-based manufacturer specializing in high-performance cutting tools for the metalworking industry. Since its establishment, the company has focused on delivering reliable tooling solutions through continuous investment in technology, quality control, and product development. Our product portfolio includes solid carbide end mills, drills, thread mills, reamers, carbide inserts, PCD/CBN tools, and customized tooling solutions for a wide range of machining applications. JJ TOOLS serves customers in various industries, including automotive, aerospace, mold & die, medical, energy, and general precision engineering. With advanced manufacturing facilities and strict quality management systems, JJ TOOLS is committed to providing consistent product quality, competitive lead times, and technical support to customers worldwide. description: Leistritz Produktionstechnik GmbH – Precision in Machine Tools and Cutting Tools Leistritz Produktionstechnik GmbH, headquartered in Pleystein, Germany, has been a technological leader in machine tools and precision cutting tools for decades. With around 350 employees, the company develops and manufactures solutions that are used worldwide in the automotive industry, mechanical engineering, and other high-tech sectors. Machine Tools – Innovation with Tradition As one of the leading manufacturers of whirling and keyseating machines, Leistritz offers highly efficient and precise production solutions for demanding applications. While keyseating machines are used in e.g. pump and agricultural technology, whirling machines are indispensable in drivetrain technology and the automotive industry. Our machines stand out for their highest accuracy, durability, and continuous development in close cooperation with customer requirements. Precision Cutting Tools – Efficiency in Machining Complementing its machine tool portfolio, Leistritz provides a comprehensive range of tailor-made cutting tools. The product spectrum includes among others milling cutters, drills, end-finishing tools, as well as innovative solutions. With customized solutions, Leistritz plays a key role in improving productivity and cost efficiency in machining processes. Integrated Expertise from a Single Source The unique strength of Leistritz lies in the combination of machine tool engineering and tool technology. Customers benefit from deep process know-how and perfectly aligned solutions – from development and manufacturing to application. This close integration not only ensures technological excellence but also creates sustainable competitive advantages for our partners. With a strong focus on quality, innovation, and long-term collaboration, Leistritz Produktionstechnik GmbH is a trusted partner for companies that demand the highest levels of precision and efficiency in machining.

description: Established in 2014, LIPHOCO is a Vietnam-based manufacturer and OEM supplier specializing in scaffolding systems, steel fabrication, CNC machining, and Fabrication Service. Our main products include ringlock scaffolding, wedge lock scaffolding systems, steel shoring props, steel ladders, warehouse trolleys, laser-cut components, welded assemblies, and customized OEM metal products based on customer drawings and specifications. LIPHOCO currently operates 2 manufacturing factories with a total production area of up to 16,000 m², strategically located only 40 km from Cat Lai Port, helping optimize logistics efficiency and export lead times for international customers. Our facilities are equipped with CNC laser cutting machines, CNC bending systems, punching machines, robotic and manual welding lines, and strict quality inspection processes throughout every production stage. We are certified with ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, EN12810 standards, and Sedex Membership, reflecting our commitment to quality, sustainability, and responsible manufacturing. LIPHOCO proudly exports products and OEM manufacturing solutions to the United States, Japan, Mexico, the Netherlands, Australia, and other international markets. We are committed to providing reliable quality, competitive pricing, responsive communication, and long-term manufacturing partnerships for global B2B customers.

description: LKM's main business lines are standard mould bases, high precision interchangeable plates, custom-made mould bases, precision machining and mould components. LKM operates a number of production facilities in Asia, with a workforce of over 4000 employees and a portfolio of over 600 CNC machining centres. Delivering genuine value The life-time value of an injection or die-cast mould is a function of the longevity of a mould, the direct cost of mould, the indirect costs of fitting and maintenance services, and the simplicity of the production and ownership process. By combining our experienced workforce with advanced machining capabilities and a trustworthy business model, our customers find using LKM products is a highly effective way to reduce long-term and hidden costs, thereby maximising long-term value. Industry recognition In many Asian markets, the LKM Standard is associated with quality and reliability. LKM is regarded as a highly reliable partner in the manufacturing value chain by end-users in electronics, automotive and medical equipment industries. Many end-users list “LKM-sourced products” in their standard technical requirements, and consider this as the hassle-free way to upgrade the long-term value of their mould projects. Innovations: First company in Greater China to use CNC machining centres for mould base manufacturing in 1987 Upgraded manufacturing process to CNC-machining-centre-driven, fully replacing traditional milling and drilling machines Created the first online certification system in mould base industry Developed online platform for “add-on” machining services Introduced more eco-friendly precision milling to replace grinding across standard products With over 230 robotic arms, fully automated production of standard plates and parts.

product_categories: Cleaning Devices & Clean Air Systems
description: Losma has been designing and building purification systems for machine tools since 1974. In over 50 years, it has developed its know-how, which translates into an efficient technical consulting service supporting customers from designing to installing turnkey systems. Losma is an international leading company in the filtration industry. The only one that can supply complete air and liquid depuration solutions. Our reliable and innovative solutions cover over 95% of the industry’s plant needs. Losma products are widespread worldwide and are renowned for their high efficiency, modularity and excellent value for money. Losma Group has a strong vocation for internationalization and export. Its headquarters is in Curno, near Bergamo (Italy), but it also maintains a presence with an office near Turin. It actively manages key markets within the industry through its four subsidiaries in Germany, Great Britain, India, and the United States. Moreover, the Losma Group exports to over 60 countries thanks to its capillary distribution network. Driven by the mission to make the work environment healthier, today, Losma is an innovative company providing a wide range of solutions for the production industry.

description: MECHDARECARE INDUSTRY CO., LTD. located in Hubei, is a high-tech enterprise dedicated to the research and development of fine chemical products aimed at maintaining modern industrial equipment and processing mechanical parts. We engage in extensive collaboration with numerous domestic and international universities and research institutions, while also monitoring global scientific and technological trends and advancements. Our approach integrates product research and development with sales and technical services, tailored to the maintenance needs of industrial equipment and the production requirements of machining. We have established professional sales and service teams in major cities across the country to deliver the most scientifically sound equipment maintenance plans for industrial enterprises. Our offerings include timely and systematic products, on-site services for the safe operation of production equipment, and tailored solutions for process cleaning and rust prevention in machining production. MECHDARECARE adheres to the product design principles of safety, environmental protection, and high efficiency, providing innovative products and services for cleaning, rust prevention, anti-corrosion, descaling, sealing, lubrication, and water treatment of electromechanical equipment and metal parts across various industries, including aerospace, mechanical processing, petrochemical, steel manufacturing, energy and power, transportation, and telecommunications. description: MODUL gear cutting machines are the safe choice when it comes to precise and efficient manufacturing of gears. MODUL has repeatedly set new standards in innovative gear manufacturing technologies since 1950. MODUL offers hobbing, chamfering and deburring and power skiving to cover the complete technology range for soft machining of gears. Skiving (hobbing of hardened gears) and our power skiving machine are also provided for hard machining of gears. MODUL gear cutting machines are successfully used in many industrial sectors, including automotive and e-mobility, robotic, aerospace, railway, agricultural machinery and commercial vehicles, energy sector and at manufacturers of industrial components. MODUL gear cutting machines are ideal for wheel-type gears and shafts for transmissions, shafts with multiple gears, gears made from special materials, gears on crankshafts as well as for milling and chamfering / deburring. MODUL gear cutting machines deliver high productivity and flexibility for both single-piece or small-batch and mass production with a high level of automation and customization.

description: We are a Japanese manufacturer specializing in hydraulic press machines. Our FB press machines hold the world’s top market share, and we have exported them to more than 30 countries worldwide. In addition to our headquarters in Japan, we also have sales and service offices in South Korea, China, Thailand, Canada, and Germany, enabling us to provide comprehensive after-sales support globally. Fine blanking processing, commonly referred to as “FB processing,” has become widely established as an economical manufacturing method that applies hydrostatic pressure to metal materials in order to enhance plasticity, allowing smooth full-surface shearing and three-dimensional forming of thick materials. In FB processing, besides the shearing force, hydrostatic pressure is generated by using a blank holder force that clamps the material with V-shaped projections, as well as a counter pressure opposing the shearing force. Dedicated FB presses are equipped with hydraulic control systems that independently adjust these forces, while also providing processing speeds of approximately 5–35 mm per second, together with high rigidity and precision.

description: Founded 74 years ago, the company is a pioneer in ring forging in Japan. Rolling forging is a technique that enlarges a material from a small diameter to a larger one with very little material waste, making it an optimal method for producing ring products. We are capable of forging rings from OD150mm to OD5000mm, and have the equipment to handle even a single piece. Especially, we are the only company in Japan that can forge rings over OD4000mm. We also have an experience of forging aluminum, copper, titanium, and other materials. We mainly supply products to the bearing, construction machinery, and shipbuilding industries. We have recently strengthened our capabilities in machining challenging materials, including aluminum and titanium, and are actively expanding our presence in the aerospace and semiconductor industries.

description: Founded in 2007, Penta Laser is a leading global provider of high-power laser cutting, laser welding, and intelligent manufacturing equipment and solutions. Penta Laser is a high-tech group corporation specializing in R&D, production, sales, and service. With six major R&D and manufacturing bases globally, located in Wuhan, Wenzhou, Linyi, Xiangyang, and Yangzhou in China, as well as Florence, Italy, the company has fully incorporated advanced Italian laser processing technology and adheres to strict European standards. This ensures stable and reliable product performance while providing customers with efficient and standardized global after-sales services. Currently, Penta Laser's products and services are available in over 100 cities across China and more than 30 countries and regions worldwide. The company consistently ranks among the top exporters of high-power laser cutting equipment in China's domestic industry. In 2025, Yangtze Optical Fibre and Cable Joint Stock Limited Company (referred to as "YOFC"; stock codes: 601869.SH, 06869.HK) completed the strategic acquisition of Penta Laser. With globally leading expertise in specialty optical fibers and fiber lasers, YOFC will integrate its core technologies to significantly strengthen Penta Laser's R&D capabilities in laser equipment. This collaboration will achieve vertical integration of the entire industrial chain, from core technology to end products. Through our commitment to the core values of "Customer Focus, Accountability, Integrity, Innovation, and Stakeholder Benefits," Penta Laser relentlessly pursues its mission to drive technological innovation in laser applications. This dedication fuels our development of intelligent laser equipment and our pursuit of global leadership in the field.

description: Profiroll Technologies GmbH – Precision in cold forming MACHINES, TOOLS AND PROCESSES FROM A SINGLE SOURCE Profiroll Technologies GmbH develops and manufactures machines, tools and technologies for cold forming in Germany. Customers benefit from the integrated solution approach: machines, die and processes from one source. CORE COMPETENCE: ROLLING TECHNOLOGY The equipment portfolio includes CNC-controlled machines for thread, profile, spline and cold ring rolling. It is complemented by intelligent software solutions, sensor technology and process visualisation. With its e-Rolling product line, Profiroll also offers assistance systems for automatic temperature and hardness compensation, tool monitoring and quality assurance in continuous operation. NEW: AXIAL SPLINE FORMING With the newly developed PA 450 axial spline forming machine, Profiroll is expanding its portfolio with a process for the economical production of small internal splines. The tool profile is transferred to the workpiece in an axial process – ideal for components with small internal diameters, such as rotor shafts for electric motors. INDUSTRY DIVERSITY Profiroll's technologies are used in numerous industries: automotive and supplier industry, aerospace, energy and drive technology, wind power, and roller bearing and fastener industry. The processes for manufacturing heavy-duty and complex components are also used in the field of robotics. CONTRIBUTION TO ELECTROMOBILITY One focus of current development is on applications for e-mobility. These include, in particular, rotor shafts for electric motors and components for brake and steering systems. These markets are key drivers of Profiroll's corporate growth. INTERNATIONAL ORIENTATION In addition to its headquarters in Bad Düben, Profiroll has branches in China, Japan, the USA, India, Spain, Italy and Poland. Further partners in Europe, Asia and South America ensure a global sales and service presence.
address: PEE-WEE-Straße 1, Bad Düben

description: RDI Technologies is a Knoxville-based technology company specializing in high-tech vibration analysis and predictive maintenance. We are best known for pioneering Motion Amplification®, a proprietary video-processing technology that allows users to see and measure motion invisible to the naked eye. Core Technology: Motion Amplification® The company’s primary innovation is turning standard video cameras into massive arrays of sensors. Virtual Sensors: Their software treats every pixel in a video frame as an independent sensor. This allows for millions of data points to be collected simultaneously without physical contact with the machinery. Visualization: The software amplifies subtle vibrations and movements, creating a video where the physical displacement is visually obvious. This helps engineers identify root causes—like structural looseness or misalignment—that would be difficult to spot using traditional "point-based" sensors like accelerometers. Why It’s Significant RDI's technology bridges the gap between complex data and human intuition. Instead of relying solely on "squiggly lines" (waveforms and spectrums), maintenance teams can watch a video of a machine vibrating in real-time. This makes it significantly easier to communicate technical issues to non-technical stakeholders and speeds up the repair process across industries like manufacturing, power generation, and aerospace.

description: We are Rhythm Vietnam (Saigon) Co., Ltd - a member of Rhythm Group, the only manufacturer in Vietnam that handles metal stamping, heat-treatment, plating, overmolding/ insertmolding and solenoid coils under one roof - giving Japanese and global companies a single, trusted partner to localize their supply chain without sacrificing the quality standards they built at home. Since our establishment in 1995, we have been engaged in the production of metal stamping products in Vietnam for more than 30 years. We can produce wide variety of shapes can be produced for various applications, including drawn products, terminals, busbars, yokes, plates, holders, brackets, elements, laminated cores, clamps, retainers, and calipers. Our Vietnamese team of talented professionals brings together a wealth of experience and expertise to provide our customers with customised solutions that meet their stamping challenges and exceed their expectations. We offer in-house design and development of metal stamping dies. Progressive in-die tapping and in-die rivetting/crimping are also available. With our integrated production process starting from tooling, we can handle urgent changes in specification. In addition to stamping products, we also produce insert molding parts, winding coils and assembly parts. Moreover, we have our own plating line, which enables us to cover the entire process from stamping raw materials through plating on those surface and assembling into modules. Having all these in-house processes enables us to reduce production lead time and its cost. Today, there are more than 40 million products made by our experienced Vietnamese staff and we handle an average of 500 types of products per month with a focus on automotive and two-wheelers as well as solar power generators, home appliances and motor assisted bicycles industries. We deliver products more than 80 customers not only within Vietnam, South East Asia but also to countries around the world.

With a focus on quality content, industry knowledge, and excellent service to the communities we serve our various media channels connect and engage with industry experts , suppliers and users. International Metalworking News for Asia (IMNA) delivers print magazines, digital e-magazines, and multimedia-rich online platforms with embedded video content—facilitating technology transfer by keeping readers informed of the latest industry news, trends, and innovations. description: We have numerous advanced production facilities capable of handling a wide variety of workpiece shapes, including vertical 5-axis machining centers, multi-tasking machines, and wire-cut EDM machines. We are expanding our 5-axis machining x high-precision facilities and continuing to hone our technology so that we can meet all of our customers' needs, including short-term processing requests and difficult processing (5-axis machining, pipe bending, etc.). We perform hand finishing such as deburring, drilling, tapping, mirror polishing, and seal surface polishing in areas that are difficult to reach by machine processing. We own a variety of grinding machines and can handle processing with high precision flatness and parallelism. We manufacture products responsibly under an integrated in-house system, starting with parts processing, welding, leak testing (vacuum/airtight), secondary processing, hand finishing, and final assembly. We also produce a wide variety of products in small lots on a daily basis, and can accommodate customer product requests, consultations on processing details, and short delivery times. We use the latest inspection equipment to perform precise measurements and evaluations to rigorously check the quality of product dimensions, appearance, etc. We also strive to improve quality by recording inspection results and managing information on product quality. Suntec VN Company Limited was established in March 2023 as a wholly owned subsidiary of Suntec Co., Ltd. in the Long Duc Industrial Park in southern Ho Chi Minh City. We decided to expand into Vietnam, the home country of our trainees, to strengthen the supply of products to both Japanese and local customers, as well as to enhance our business continuity planning (BCP). We have appointed trainees who have honed their skills in Japan for over six years as local technical managers and are enhancing our in-house inspection facilities and equipment to establish a quality control system equival

description: Taiwan Machine Tool & Accessory Builders’ Association (TMBA) was founded on Oct. 5th, 2007. TMBA is consisted of more than 800 members of machine tools, accessory, components, and tools companies. The supply chain with intimate cooperative relationship leads Taiwan machine tool industry to own excellent competitiveness on quality and price in the international market. Up to 90% of Taiwan machine tool and accessory industry is located in the central of Taiwan, especially at Taichung, the best cluster of machine tool industry in the world. The main mission of TMBA is to integrate the opinion of Taiwan machine tool & accessory, and establish industry development strategy with government to assist in promoting industrial upgrade, which will have Taiwan machine tool & accessory industry continually pursue innovation and R&D to produce high quality machine tools. Furthermore, TMBA is committed to exchange with advanced countries to link up with the world. In the same time, TMBA is dedicated to offer its member companies a comprehensive service package, such as industrial personnel training, overseas & domestic exhibition services, and market analysis information, etc.

description: Thinh Qua Trading Service One Member Co., Ltd. (Vietnam) was established in 2008 and is located in Ho Chi Minh City, the largest economic hub and seaport of Vietnam. It serves as the first stepping stone for Thinh Qua's expansion into international markets, with a strong presence across Southeast Asia. Currently, the company's headquarters is located at Mieu Ong Cu Intersection – Binh Chuan Ward, Thuan An City, Binh Duong Province. The company primarily operates in the field of industrial machinery, including CNC machining centers, laser cutting machines, welding equipment, mold processing machines, mechanical stamping equipment, hydraulic presses, EDM machines, and other related products. In addition, the company owns a modern 5,000 m² showroom that integrates product display, warehousing, and office space, providing customers with a one-stop purchasing solution for mechanical equipment. With comprehensive after-sales services and a strong maintenance team, the company is committed to delivering fast, efficient, and high-quality after-sales support to its customers. At present, the company has expanded its presence with additional branches in Bac Ninh (Hanoi) and Hai Phong in Vietnam, as well as in Shanghai, Jiangsu, Xi'an, Zhejiang, and Anhui in China.China.

Our core product offerings include: • Tri-Wall Boxes: World-renowned heavy-duty corrugated containers for international shipping, capable of replacing traditional wooden or metal crates. • Tri-Wall Pallets: Durable, lightweight corrugated pallets, alongside premium wood, plywood, and plastic pallets. • Octabins: Bulk material corrugated containers for granular products. • Hybrid Packaging: Tailored solutions combining corrugated board, plywood, plastic, and steel. • Standard carton boxes, sheet pallets (slip sheets), returnable boxes, and various packaging accessories. With advanced manufacturing facilities in Vietnam (Yen My II Industrial Park, Hung Yen & Long Duc Industrial Park, Dong Nai) and strict adherence to ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 standards, we offer flexible end-to-end packaging solutions—from design and small-lot production to large-scale global supply. Our mission is to ensure the safe, efficient, and sustainable transit of your goods worldwide.
address: A-2,4, Road N1-2,Long Duc Industrial Park, An Phuoc Ward, Long Thanh District, Dong Nai Province

description: With total sales of over USD 1.5 billion, UNITED MACHINING SOLUTIONS is one of the largest machine tool manufacturers in the world. With around 5,000 employees at over 50 global production, service and sales locations, UNITED MACHINING SOLUTIONS is close to its customers and highly efficient. The group is organized into two divisions: UNITED GRINDING and UNITED MACHINING. UNITED GRINDING includes the brands MÄGERLE, BLOHM, JUNG, STUDER, SCHAUDT, MIKROSA, WALTER, EWAG and IRPD. Its technologies include surface and profile grinding machines, cylindrical grinding machines, machines for tool machining and machine tools for additive manufacturing. The UNITED MACHINING division includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. It includes machines for EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), high-speed milling and laser technology as well as spindle production and automation solutions.

description: VERNAL has been dedicated to manufacturing custom parts and assemblies for the past 40 years. We offer a range of services, including forming, machining, assembly, and precise measurement verification. As a trusted solution provider and technical supporter, we collaborate with our customers in the early stage of product development to meet their high-quality requirements. Our team of experts works diligently in a well-designed and employee-friendly environment to fulfill each customer’s unique needs. VERNAL is proud to present our new product line, VERNALCO, which specializes in driven tool holders for Swiss type CNC machine. Our exceptional capabilities enable us to design and fabricate such holders to meet the demands of high-precision machining. We ensure the quality of each holder through rigorous precision monitoring, conducting production and inspection in controlled environments with appropriate temperature and humidity levels. Additionally, all holders must pass dynamic tests before they are delivered. By continuing to enhance production capacity, Vernalco is prepared to deal with a broader range of machining requirements. VERNALCO is on a par with established firms in terms of the precision and quality of driven tool holders. In addition to possessing impeccable high-precision fabrication skills and offering diverse products, we also have the ability to satisfy custom requirements for driven tool holders and can adjust our operations to fulfill various machining needs. This gives our customers and us confidence that we can tackle any difficult challenges that may arise

description: Forming Innovations since 1893 Technical innovations have determined the rise of WAFIOS ever since the first wire fencing machine was developed. More than 130 years of experience in the wire and tube processing industry have made WAFIOS an internationally renowned name for quality. We are proud of our tradition, and to this day its strongest stabilizer is the innovative corporate culture and the proverbial inventive spirit of our Swabian homeland. We develop, design, and produce sophisticated machinery for the wire and tube-processing industry and for cold-forging applications. The classic range of products it supplemented by solutions for current topics, like e-mobility, digitization and Industry 4.0. Innovation and research are a driving factor here. Different subsidy programs, like e.g. for the e-mobility and sustainability sector, help us in the development of trend-setting technologies. Since 2021, we have received the award of the BSFZ seal by the Certification Body for Research Grants (in German: Bescheinigungsstelle für Forschungszulage, BSFZ for short) for Innovation Competence in Research and Development.

description: Walter is one of the world’s leading manufacturers of cutting tools. Founded in 1919 and headquartered in Tübingen, Germany, the company develops, manufactures and supplies precision tools for the metalworking industry. This includes products for milling, turning, holemaking and threading applications – as well as matching tool adaptors and services. Walter takes a holistic approach that brings together all the essential components of machining and reduces complexity for customers. The company’s entire range helps customers to achieve alignment of their production in a cost-effective, efficient and reliable manner. With its complete solution concept, Walter positions itself as an end-to-end partner. This covers the entire machining process: from high-performance standard tools and custom special tools to tailor-made process solutions. This offering is complemented by innovative apps and software solutions for digital connectivity. Altogether, Walter provides tailored solutions for a wide range of requirements in the metal industry. Walter is at home in numerous sectors, including general mechanical engineering, aerospace, automotive and energy. In all these areas, the company supports its customers in machining components made from a wide variety of metal materials with precision, cost-effectiveness and reliability. This is embodied by the company’s brand promise - Engineering Kompetenz.

description: Yaw Sheng Machinery Industrial Co., Ltd. | Professional Manufacturer of Shot Blasting & Surface Treatment Equipment Founded in 1976, Yaw Sheng Machinery Industrial Co., Ltd. has over 40 years of experience in the surface treatment equipment industry. We are a leading Taiwanese manufacturer specializing in sand blasting machines (shot blasting machines, shot cleaning machines), blasting rooms, and automated surface treatment systems. Adhering to our core philosophy of “Quality First, Customer Foremost,” we are committed to continuous equipment R&D, process optimization, and technological innovation. Over the years, we have evolved from a single equipment supplier into a comprehensive provider of integrated surface treatment solutions, serving a wide range of industries both domestically and internationally. Products & Equipment We offer a diverse range of surface treatment equipment, all of which can be customized based on production capacity and workpiece requirements: Sand Blasting Machines Shot Blasting Machines Blasting Room Turnkey Solutions Conveyor-Type Automated Surface Treatment Systems Customized Special-Purpose Equipment Design & Manufacturing From standalone machines to complete plant planning, we provide total solutions to meet various industrial process needs. Customization & System Integration Capability Our experienced R&D team provides tailored solutions based on: Workpiece size and weight Production cycle time and capacity requirements Surface treatment quality expectations On-site space and workflow planning We deliver optimized equipment configurations and integrated systems to help customers enhance automation and overall production efficiency. Brand Philosophy Guided by our brand vision as a “Benchmark in the Surface Treatment Industry,” Yaw Sheng Machinery continues to advance technology, enhance quality, and strives to become a trusted global partner in the surface treatment equipment industry.

description: YIH KUAN ENT CO., LTD. is a professional milling head manufacturer based in Taiwan, with nearly 50 years of experience in design and manufacturing. We specialize in the development, production, and application integration of various types of milling heads. Our main product range includes turret milling heads, gantry (plano) milling heads, and angle heads, which are widely applied in conventional milling machines, gantry machines, and various machining equipment. We are also capable of recommending suitable configurations based on different machining requirements. In addition to manufacturing high-quality milling heads, YIH KUAN has extensive experience in machine retrofitting and upgrading projects. Based on the customer’s existing machine conditions, applications, and operational needs, we provide practical and effective upgrade solutions. We believe that a milling head is not just an accessory, but a critical component that directly affects machining efficiency, stability, and the overall value of the machine. With the right milling head upgrade and integration, customers can significantly enhance performance without replacing the entire machine. Our core values are built on professionalism, reliability, and long-term partnership. Supported by a strong and experienced team in R&D, manufacturing, assembly, and after-sales service, we ensure strict quality control at every stage. YIH KUAN is not only a milling head manufacturer, but also a trusted partner in helping our customers achieve efficient and sustainable machining solutions.
address: No. 172, Gongye 9th Rd., Renhua Vil., Dali Dist., Taichung City 412037, Taiwan

description: Zhejiang Zhicheng is a joint venture supported by Jingxing Paper Industry Group (Stock Code: 002067), combining the group’s financial strength with specialized expertise in precision manufacturing. Founded in 1993, the company has been deeply involved in the CNC machine tool industry for nearly 30 years. In 2010, it established Zhejiang Zhicheng Technology Co., Ltd.​ in Pinghu to achieve technological upgrades and scale expansion. With a registered capital of 30 million RMB, the company operates a large-scale manufacturing base covering an area of over 30,000 square meters, with a building area of 20,000 square meters. The company specializes in CNC Gantry Integrated Machines, which combine automated material handling with high-efficiency processing. Our main product lines include: Disc Part Machining: TT Series Parallel Twin-Spindle CNC Gantry Machine. Shaft Part Machining: MW Series Opposed Twin-Spindle CNC Gantry Machine. General Precision Machining: QT Series Precision CNC Gantry Machine. A dedicated R&D team of over 20 technical professionals​ in mechanical, electrical, robotics, and software engineering, including one Japanese engineer and one Senior Engineer. Long-term industry-academia collaboration with the Robotics Institute of Shanghai Jiao Tong University. Holds more than 10 National Invention and Utility Model Patents, demonstrating a solid foundation of proprietary technology. Global Sales Network: Our products are sold across China and exported to international markets. Client Base: We primarily serve top-tier automotive manufacturers and their Tier-1 suppliers, including: Leading Domestic Automakers: Such as SAIC Motor​ and FAW-Volkswagen. Multinational Corporations: Serving numerous German and Japanese-funded​ companies within the domestic machinery industry. Workforce: The company currently employs approximately 150 people, maintaining a lean and efficient operational structure.
address: 1699 4th Xingping Rd, Pinghu city, Zhejiang Province

product_categories: Engraving & Marking Systems
description: ZNK LASER is a professional supplier of high-quality laser cutting consumables and accessories, serving fiber laser cutting machine users, manufacturers, and distributors worldwide. Founded with the mission to deliver premium-quality parts at competitive factory-direct prices, we have built a comprehensive product portfolio covering the full spectrum of laser cutting needs. Our Core Product Lines: Laser Nozzles — Single-layer, double-layer, and high-pressure nozzles in copper, brass, hardened copper, and tungsten carbide. Available in diameters from D20 to D37, compatible with all major cutting head brands including Raytools, Precitec, WSX, and BOCI. Protective Lenses & Windows — Raytools original and ZNK-branded protective lenses (24.9mm, 27.9mm, 30mm, 38mm), collimating lenses, and focusing lenses. All lenses undergo strict optical inspection and are shipped in anti-static packaging. Capacitive Sensors & Probes — Height-following sensors and auto-focus probes for major cutting head models, ensuring precise and reliable cutting performance. Cutting Head Accessories — Nozzle holders, adapters, water-cooling plates, ceramic rings, and complete spare parts kits for laser cutting heads. Handheld Fiber Laser Marking Machines — Portable 20W–100W marking systems for metal and non-metal engraving, ideal for on-site industrial marking applications. Laser Cleaning & Maintenance Tools — Professional cleaning kits, optical-grade lens paper, and maintenance supplies. What Sets Us Apart: 8,000+ SKUs & 155+ brands — One-stop sourcing for all laser consumables Factory-direct pricing — Up to 80–90% below typical market prices In-stock fast shipping — Most orders ship within 3 business days OEM & Customization — Custom packaging, branding, and specification support Quality guaranteed — Every product undergoes rigorous quality inspection before shipment Website: www.znklaser.com | Alibaba Store: ZNK Laser Technology Co., Ltd. Contact: Gavin Yuan | Email: info@znklaser.com
address: 9 Luoshan Road, Xuzhou Economic and Technological Development Zone, Jiangsu Province, 221000, China

product_categories: MES, Predictive Maintenance, Factory Management Systems
description: Fact Base is a SaaS startup for the manufacturing industry, founded in September 2022, with the mission of “making manufacturing seamless.” Its core product, the drawing management system “ZUMEN,” was developed to enable digital transformation (DX) for small and medium-sized enterprises and local factories. In many manufacturing sites, paper drawings and related documents still play a central role in operations, and due to the complexity of managing them, accumulated data is not being fully utilized. “ZUMEN” addresses these challenges by centrally managing drawings and related documents in the cloud, significantly improving efficiency in complex management tasks. As a first step toward data utilization in manufacturing, it is being increasingly adopted by small factories and SMEs.
address: Phòng 4611, Tầng 46 Bitexco Financial Tower, 2 Hải Triều, Phường Sài Gòn, TP Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam
